display.purpose: Hero headline only, one per page. Manrope 700.

label.purpose: Neutral silver eyebrows, wide 0.24em tracking, uppercase.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default lift for carbon vehicle cards and panels on the dark void.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Deeper, softer pool on hover — the surface rises, it does not glow.

shadows.name: machined-button
shadows.purpose: The inset white line is the milled top edge of the silver plate button.

motion.name: ease-mechanical
motion.purpose: Default easing for reveals, hero rise, and the dial draw.

motion.name: dial-draw
motion.purpose: Hero instrument-cluster arc draws once on load, freezes drawn under reduced-motion.

motion.name: hero-float
motion.purpose: Slow mechanical drift of the floating hero card after it rises in.

components.name: Primary Button (Machined Silver)
components.description: The milled bright plate CTA — dark ink on a brushed-silver gradient, used for primary actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.76); background-image: linear-gradient(#f5f7f8, #bdc4c9 58%, #dce1e4); color: #20252a; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; box-shadow: 0 5px 12px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.4), inset 0 1px #fff; cursor: pointer; transition: filter .2s, transform .2s; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { filter: brightness(1.05); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0c1013, 0 0 0 4px #c98a5c; }

components.name: Leather Button (Conversion)
components.description: The single warm cognac-leather CTA at the sell/valuation moment. Used once per page.
components.css: .ds-btn-leather { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 16px 32px; border-radius: 9999px; background-color: #643e22; background-image: radial-gradient(120% 90% at 18% 0%, rgba(255,255,255,0.1), transparent 52%), linear-gradient(135deg, #7d512e, #5c3a20); color: #f3e5d4; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1rem; border: none; cursor: pointer; box-shadow: 0 14px 28px -16px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.6); transition: filter .2s; } .ds-btn-leather:hover { filter: brightness(1.08); } .ds-btn-leather:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0c1013, 0 0 0 4px #c98a5c; }

components.name: Outline Button (Ghost on Dark)
components.description: Secondary action — a light hairline on a faint wash that brightens on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 24px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.04); color: #eff2f3; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color .2s, background .2s; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { border-color: rgba(255,255,255,0.45); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.09); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px #0c1013, 0 0 0 4px #c98a5c; }

components.name: Carbon Vehicle Card
components.description: Woven carbon-fibre vehicle card with a machined top edge, photo, tabular price that never wraps.
components.html:
Volvo XC60

2021 · 4 500 mil · Diesel

289 000 kr→
components.css: .ds-card-carbon { border-radius: 1rem; overflow: hidden; background-color: #22272c; background-image: repeating-linear-gradient(45deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.045) 0 2px, transparent 2px 4px), repeating-linear-gradient(-45deg, rgba(255,255,255,0.035) 0 2px, rgba(0,0,0,0.24) 2px 4px), linear-gradient(150deg, #262b30, #1b1f24); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12); border-top: 1.5px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); box-shadow: 0 14px 28px -16px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.6); transition: box-shadow .25s, transform .25s; } .ds-card-carbon:hover { box-shadow: 0 26px 44px -22px rgb(0 0 0 / 0.7); transform: translateY(-3px); } .ds-card-img { aspect-ratio: 3/2; background: #20242a; } .ds-card-body { padding: 16px 20px 20px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 1.25rem; color: #eff2f3; margin: 0; } .ds-card-meta { font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; color: #9aa2a8; font-size: 0.9rem; margin: 4px 0 16px; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; } .ds-card-foot { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-card-price { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; color: #eff2f3; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-card-arrow { color: #c6cbcf; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Dark form field — faint wash, hairline border, cognac focus shift.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; border-radius: 0.75rem; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15); background: rgba(255,255,255,0.05); padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Instrument Sans', sans-serif; font-size: 0.95rem; color: #eff2f3; transition: border-color .2s, background .2s; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #7f888e; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #c98a5c; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.08); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(201,138,92,0.3); }

components.name: Header Navigation
components.description: Graphite/silver gradient bar with real accessible links and a machined CTA.
components.html:
Svenljunga Bilcenter
HemBilarOm oss
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 36px; padding: 14px 28px; background-image: linear-gradient(100deg, #1d2024 0%, #27252d 45%, #4b4d54 100%); } .ds-nav-mark { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: 0.02em; color: #eff2f3; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; gap: 36px; } .ds-nav-links a { font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-size: 0.9rem; color: #c4ccd1; text-decoration: none; transition: color .15s; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #ffffff; } .ds-nav-cta { padding: 10px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.76); background-image: linear-gradient(#f5f7f8, #bdc4c9 58%, #dce1e4); color: #20252a; font-family: Manrope, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 0.85rem; cursor: pointer; }

narrative.overview: Dark automotive craft: smoked-titanium heroes, gunmetal informational bands, carbon-fibre cards and footer, a graphite/silver header, and exactly one warm cognac-leather moment at conversion. Materials are genuinely present but disciplined, never theatrical. The tone is trygg, tydlig, personlig — dark but warm and human, a serious well-run local shop, not a cold luxury boutique or a neon car ad. Trust is earned by specificity — real logo, real inventory, real address — not by gloss. The only true colour on the page is the clean photography of the real stock.
keyCharacteristics: Dark by conviction — deepest surface #0c1013, light primary text #eff2f3.
Real materials with a machined top edge, never flat dark-mode gray.
Cognac warmth held to ~3%: focus rings, one seam, one leather CTA.
Photography is the only saturated colour; textures never sit over photos.
Tabular numerals everywhere numbers matter; Manrope + Instrument Sans.

rules.name: The 3% Cognac Rule
rules.body: The cognac accent appears on <=3-5% of any screen: focus rings, one seam, one CTA. Its rarity is the point — the moment it becomes a section background or a per-card arrow colour, the warmth is spent. Metal (silver) carries structure; cognac carries the one human moment.

rules.name: The Neutral-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Eyebrows and section rules use muted silver-grey (#9aa2a8), never cognac. Warmth is a destination (the CTA), not a decoration sprinkled across headings.

rules.name: The Instrument-Cluster Rule
rules.body: Every price, mileage, and year uses tabular figures (font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums) and prices never wrap. Numbers should line up column-to-column like a dashboard readout.

rules.name: The Machined-Edge Rule
rules.body: Elevation is signalled by the bright 1.5px top border (the milled lip), not by a glow or a coloured ring. If a raised surface has no border-top highlight, it looks like flat dark-mode gray — that's the failure.

dos: Do keep cognac at ~3-5%: focus rings, one seam, one leather CTA. Everything else structural is silver/metal or neutral grey.
Do give every raised surface a bright 1.5px machined top edge; that lip, not a shadow, is how depth reads on this dark page.
Do use tabular figures for every price, mileage, and year, and keep prices on one line.
Do let the real vehicle photography be the only saturated colour; keep it clean, and never lay a texture over a photo.
Do ship an already-visible default and enhance with reveals; provide a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every animation.
Do use neutral silver-grey (#9aa2a8) for eyebrows and rules.
donts: Don't build a generic SaaS landing: no Inter-for-everything, no purple/blue gradients, no hero-metric template, no eyebrow-on-every-section.
Don't turn this into a faceless marketplace (a Blocket/Bilweb clone); it is a dealer with a face, address, and phone.
Don't drift fashion / luxury-goods: no over-leathering. Cognac stays ~3%; leather is one moment, not a theme.
Don't do fake-luxury car-ad gloss: no neon rim-light hero renders, no shouting hero type, no manufactured hype.
Don't ship AI-slop tells: no gradient text, no default glassmorphism, no 01/02/03 numbered section scaffolding, no side-stripe accent borders, no invented stats.
Don't let a raised surface go flat: a card with no machined top edge reads as 2020-era dark-mode gray.
Don't put cognac on every card arrow or as a section fill — the moment it repeats, the warmth is spent.
